title: AP-Tender Document Priority Order
text_english: PRIORITY of CONTRACT DOCUMENTS in case of CONFLICT (highest to lowest): (1) CONTRACT AGREEMENT; (2) LETTER of ACCEPTANCE; (3) BILL of QUANTITIES; (4) DRAWINGS; (5) SCOPE of WORK; (6) SPECIAL CONDITIONS of CONTRACT (SCC); (7) GENERAL CONDITIONS of CONTRACT (GCC) including SCHEDULES; (8) Any OTHER documents forming part of the contract. The ENGINEER-IN-CHARGE — namely the {{engineer_in_charge_designation}} (default Chief Engineer) — SHALL DECIDE contractual matters between the {{procuring_entity}} and the Contractor.

title: JV Joint and Several Liability — AP Tender Variant
text_english: JV partners SHALL be 'JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY' RESPONSIBLE for the project. The LEAD PARTNER SHALL have a MINIMUM {{lead_partner_min_share_pct}}% (default 51%) STAKE in the JV; OTHER Joint-Venture partners SHALL have AT LEAST {{other_partner_min_share_pct}}% (default 20%) AND ABOVE. JV partners SHALL be LIABLE INDIVIDUALLY proportionate to their share AND JOINTLY for 100% share. Maximum JV members: {{max_jv_members}}. JV agreement reference: {{jv_agreement_ref}}.
